# PersonalSongGifts

> Custom, one-of-a-kind songs crafted from your story and memories — perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, weddings, memorials, and other meaningful moments. Delivered in 24–48 hours.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, samples, how it works, and customer reviews.
- [Create Your Song](/create): Step-by-step form to order a custom song (recipient, occasion, story, music style).
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the service.

## Optional

- Contact: support@personalsonggifts.com
